718.note: 718 naming started in 2017. Includes Boxster and Cayman variants.

918.note: 918 Spyder was produced 2013-2015 only. Hypercar limited production.

keyObservations: All Porsche sports cars (718, 911, Boxster) use staggered tire setups (wider rear)
Cayenne uses both square and staggered setups depending on trim
Performance trims (GT3, GT3 RS, GT2 RS) use significantly wider tires
Modern 992-generation 911 uses 19"/20" front with 20"/21" rear combinations
Tire sizes increased substantially across generations (911 went from 17" to 21")
918 Spyder uses unique 20" front / 21" rear setup
